title: 10 best herbal capsules for oily skin
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for oily skin are natural supplements that contain a blend of herbs and botanicals that help to balance and regulate sebum production, reducing excessive oiliness and controlling acne. Examples of herbal capsules that can benefit oily skin include those containing green tea, chamomile, and tea tree extract, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that soothe the skin and reduce redness. By taking these capsules, individuals with oily skin may experience fewer breakouts and a more even tone, leading to improved self-confidence and a better quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with oily skin because of its natural antifungal and antibacterial properties, which work to reduce the production of sebum in the skin. The capsules contain salvia officinalis, a herb known for its ability to regulate oil production and balance the skin's pH level. Regular use of sage capsules can help to purify the skin, reducing inflammation and redness associated with oily skin conditions. This natural remedy promotes healthy skin by controlling acne and other skin imperfections.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial Properties: Sage's antimicrobial properties help to reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin, which can contribute to oily skin and acne by reducing inflammation and preventing clogged pores.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: Sage's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as rosmarinic acid, help to soothe and calm inflamed skin, reducing redness and swelling associated with oily skin and acne.

Astringent and Antioxidant Properties: Sage's astringent properties help to tighten pores and reduce oil production, while its antioxidant properties protect the skin from environmental stressors and free radicals that can contribute to oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions, including oily skin, due to their antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.
Buds: Sage buds contain a high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help reduce inflammation and soothe the skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsules helps with oily skin because of its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb's essential oils, such as thymol and carvacrol, work to reduce sebum production, controlling oiliness and preventing clogged pores. Additionally, thyme's antimicrobial effects help combat acne-causing bacteria, promoting a clearer complexion. By regulating skin's natural oil balance and combating underlying bacterial infections, herbal thyme capsules can help alleviate the symptoms of oily skin, leaving your face looking healthier and more radiant.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial property: Thyme's antibacterial compounds, such as thymol, help reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin, which can contribute to oiliness and acne.

Anti-inflammatory property: Thyme's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as rosmarinic acid, help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin conditions like acne and rosacea.
Antioxidant property: Thyme's antioxidant compounds help protect the skin from environmental stressors and free radicals, which can damage the skin and lead to increased oil production.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and antibacterial properties, thyme roots help reduce inflammation and acne-causing bacteria on the skin.
Seeds: Containing essential fatty acids and vitamins, thyme seeds nourish and balance the skin, reducing oil production and purifying the pores.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary capsules helps with oily skin because they contain antioxidant-rich rosemary extract that targets excess sebum production. This natural anti-inflammatory properties help to regulate oil glands, reducing the appearance of pores and minimizing shine. Additionally, rosemary's antiseptic and antibacterial properties work to combat acne-causing bacteria, promoting a clear and balanced complexion. By taking these capsules, individuals with oily skin can expect to see an improvement in their skin texture and tone over time.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Rosemary's antioxidant compounds help to neutralize free radicals that can cause inflammation and damage to the skin, which can lead to an overproduction of sebum and resulting oily skin.

Astringent and Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Rosemary's astringent properties help to tighten pores and reduce oil production, while its anti-inflammatory effects soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation associated with oily skin.

Improves Blood Circulation: Rosemary's ability to improve blood circulation helps to promote healthy skin function by increasing oxygenation and nutrient delivery to the skin cells, which can help regulate sebum production and reduce oiliness.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of rosemary have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce redness and swelling associated with oily skin.
Buds: Rosemary buds contain antioxidants and antibacterial compounds that can help control acne-causing bacteria and soothe irritated skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregano capsules helps with oily skin because they contain a potent compound called carvacrol, which has natural antibacterial and antifungal properties. This allows it to target the underlying causes of acne, such as clogged pores and excessive oil production. By reducing inflammation and promoting healthy gut bacteria, oregano capsules can help regulate sebum production, leading to a reduction in oily skin and a more balanced complexion. As a result, herbal oregano capsules have become a popular natural remedy for managing oily skin and acne-prone skin types.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Oregano's antibacterial compounds, such as carvacrol and thymol, can help reduce the growth of Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes) bacteria on the skin, which can contribute to clogged pores and acne.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Oregano's anti-inflammatory compounds may help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin conditions such as rosacea.
Antioxidant properties: Oregano's antioxidants can help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to the skin, leading to premature aging, fine lines, and wrinkles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, oregano roots help to reduce inflammation and regulate sebum production, making them effective for treating oily skin.
Leaves: Packed with essential oils, oregano leaves possess antibacterial properties that help combat acne-causing bacteria and prevent future breakouts on oily skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with oily skin because of its natural astringent properties, which help to shrink the pores and reduce excess oil production. The menthol content in peppermint also has a cooling effect that can help to constrict the pores, leaving the skin feeling refreshed and clarified. Additionally, peppermint's anti-inflammatory properties can help to soothe redness and irritation associated with acne-prone skin, leading to a more balanced complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Peppermint's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to clogged pores and excessive oil production.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Peppermint's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as menthol, can reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with acne-prone skin, while also calming the skin and preventing further breakouts.

Antibacterial properties: Peppermint's antibacterial properties can help combat Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes) bacteria, a common cause of acne, reducing bacterial growth and eliminating the need for harsh treatments.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, peppermint roots help regulate sebum production and reduce inflammation, making them effective against oily skin.
Barks: Containing bioactive compounds like menthol and cineole, the barks of peppermint plants have astringent and antiseptic properties that help control oiliness and soothe acne-prone skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules helps with oily skin because they are rich in antioxidants, which help to reduce inflammation and prevent clogged pores. The capsules also contain tannins, which have astringent properties that can help to constrict the pores and reduce oil production. Additionally, the capsules may help to balance the skin's natural pH levels, which can become imbalanced due to oily skin conditions. As a result, narrow-leaved paperbark capsules may help to promote healthy, clear skin by reducing oiliness and preventing breakouts.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the skin, which can contribute to oily skin.
Astringent properties: The capsules have astringent compounds that help constrict pores, reducing oil production and purifying the skin by removing excess sebum and other impurities.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
remedy_parts: Barks: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, barks help reduce sebum production and soothe acne-prone skin.
Rhyzomes: Containing natural antifungal and antibacterial properties, rhyzomes combat bacterial overgrowth that can contribute to oily skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with oily skin because they contain natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that work to balance the skin's oil production. The capsules help to reduce sebum production, unclog pores, and soothe redness and inflammation, resulting in a more even-toned complexion. Additionally, lavender has antioxidant properties that protect the skin from environmental stressors and free radicals, further helping to regulate oil levels and promote healthy, radiant-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lavender's antioxidants help reduce inflammation and free radical damage, which can contribute to oily skin by reducing sebum production and improving skin barrier function.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, can help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.

Sedative and astringent properties: The sedative properties of lavender can help relax pores and reduce sebum production, while its astringent properties can help tighten pores and absorb excess oil, resulting in a more balanced skin tone.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the English lavender plant are used due to their antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce acne and inflammation associated with oily skin.
Leaves: The leaves are used because they contain antioxidants and flavonoids that help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation caused by oily skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsules helps with oily skin because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce sebum production, thus controlling excess oil. The capsules also have natural astringent and antimicrobial properties that help to tighten pores and prevent bacterial growth, which can contribute to acne and other skin imperfections. Additionally, yarrow's cooling effects can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, leaving it looking clearer and more balanced. Overall, herbal yarrow capsules provide a natural and gentle solution for managing oily skin and promoting healthy, radiant complexion.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Yarrow capsules contain compounds that inhibit the growth of bacteria on the skin, reducing acne and inflammation caused by oil production.

Astringent and anti-inflammatory properties: The astringent properties of yarrow help to reduce excess sebum production, while its anti-inflammatory effects soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and swelling.
Antioxidant properties: Yarrow's antioxidants help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to oily skin and premature aging.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help reduce inflammation and soothe acne-prone skin.
Flowers: Abundant in chamazulene, a natural anti-inflammatory compound that helps to calm and regulate sebum production.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with oily skin because they contain flavonoids and carotenoids that have natural anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne-prone skin, while also fighting off bacteria that can cause breakouts. Additionally, the antioxidants in pot marigold capsules help to regulate sebum production, reducing the appearance of pores and leaving skin looking smoother and more balanced. Overall, pot marigold capsules provide a natural solution for oily skin, promoting a clearer and healthier complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The flavonoids and terpenes present in marigold flowers have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with oily skin.

Antioxidant Properties: The antioxidants in marigold extract neutralize free radicals that contribute to oxidative stress and inflammation, protecting the skin from damage caused by excessive oil production.
Anti-Seborrheic Properties: Marigold's sesquiterpenes have been shown to inhibit the production of sebum, reducing oil secretion and helping to regulate the skin's natural moisture balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Potent anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing redness and swelling associated with oily skin.
Seeds: Rich in antioxidants and fatty acids, which help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and improving its overall health.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with oily skin because they contain Taraxacum officinale, a natural diuretic that effectively reduces sebum production in the skin. As an antioxidant-rich herb, dandelion also inhibits the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone responsible for excessive oil secretion. By regulating oil production and reducing inflammation, dandelion capsules help control acne and leave the skin looking clearer and healthier.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as taraxasterol and triterpenoids, can help reduce redness and swelling associated with acne-prone skin, making it an effective treatment for oily skin.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant-rich compounds in dandelion capsules, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, can help neutralize free radicals that can contribute to skin damage and inflammation, reducing the appearance of pores and promoting a healthier complexion.

Choleretic properties: Dandelion's choleretic properties, which stimulate bile production, can help improve liver function and increase the body's natural detoxification processes, which can help reduce sebum production and alleviate oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots help to reduce inflammation and soothe acne-prone skin.
Seeds: Containing essential fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals, the seeds help to regulate sebum production and balance skin's natural pH.
